title: bridge-jmap: raw email JSON logged on deserialization failure
description: jmap/src/jmap.rs email_get() logs the raw JSON value 'v' when serde_json::from_value::<EmailObject>(v.clone()) fails: 'raw: {v}'. The raw JSON may contain email body content, headers, and other private email metadata. This leaks potentially sensitive email content to whatever log sink is configured. Fix: log only the email id (if extractable) or omit the raw value entirely.
